[database]
host = localhost
port = 5432
name = librarian_db
user = admin

[server]
host = 0.0.0.0
port = 8080
debug = true

[logging]
level = INFO
file = /var/log/librarian.log

text:
[project]
name = "Librarian"
version = "1.0.0"
description = "A file parsing library"

[dependencies]
pyyaml = "0.1.0"
toml = "0.10.0"

[authors]
main = "Alice Smith"
contributors = ["Bob Jones", "Carol White"]

    <book id="1">
        <title>The Great Gatsby</title>
        <author>F. Scott Fitzgerald</author>
        <year>1925</year>
        <genre>Fiction</genre>
    </book>
    <book id="2">
        <title>To Kill a Mockingbird</title>
        <author>Harper Lee</author>
        <year>1960</year>
        <genre>Classic</genre>
    </book>
    <book id="3">
        <title>1984</title>
        <author>George Orwell</author>
        <year>1949</year>
        <genre>Dystopian</genre>
    </book>
</catalog>
